events.title: Kraft Werks - Making Zip Tie Crowns
events.description:
Come join us and hang out with food, drink and crafting.
Park in the parking lot behind Frida Cinema for ease, there is a fee.
We'll be in the patio area in the back, cant miss us!

I'll bring the supplies:

hair bands
zip ties (black only)
fake black flowers
black gems or sparkly things to attach
black feathers
glue
etc.

You bring:
ideas
conversation
friendly attitude
moneys for food and drink to support the venue

events.title: Renaissance Faire - All Hallows Spring Edition
events.description: All Hallows Spring brings a spooky theme to Renaissance Pleasure Faire.  Shop, watch shows, eat, and watch the joust with us!  We're going as witches and wizards and we love casting spells!!!

events.title: Ghoul's Day Out - MCR fan day event
events.description:
Ghoul's Day Out is a My Chemical Romance fan event located at the church where the music video for Helena was filmed.  There will be lots of vendors, photo ops at the church, live music and cover band, food trucks.

https://www.instagram.com/ghoulsdayoutla

If you want to take photos at the church, you should arrive at 11AM, because the line takes about an hour.
We'll meet at noon near the cover band area and check out the vendors.   We'll retire for lunch after we are done at a nice place to eat in the Koreatown area.
